query_texts:
ALTER INDEX ALL ON [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor] REBUILD
    WITH (DATA_COMPRESSION = PAGE)

INSERT INTO [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor] (id, editor, ts, ts2, amount, qty, label, geo)
SELECT TOP (5000)
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL))            AS id,
    1                                              AS editor,
    CAST('2021-06-15T12:00:00.0000000'  AS DATETIME2(7))                         AS ts,
    CAST('2021-12-31T23:59:59.0000000' AS DATETIME2(7))                         AS ts2,
    CAST(12.500 AS DECIMAL(18,3))                       AS amount,
    CAST(7 AS BIGINT)                                 AS qty,
    'COMMON_PREFIX_LABEL'                                             AS label,
    geography::Point(47.6062, -122.3321, 4326)          AS geo
FROM sys.all_objects a CROSS JOIN sys.all_objects b

SELECT N'id', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([id]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([id]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'editor', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([editor]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([editor]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'ts', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([ts]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([ts]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'ts2', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([ts2]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([ts2]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'amount', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([amount]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([amount]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'qty', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([qty]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([qty]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'label', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([label] COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2) AS NVARCHAR(4000)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([label] COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2) AS NVARCHAR(4000)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'geo', ISNULL(MIN(CAST([geo].AsTextZM() AS NVARCHAR(4000)) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(MAX(CAST([geo].AsTextZM() AS NVARCHAR(4000)) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[pagecomp_anchor]
